notes: Configured iOS store settings (company/product/bundle/version, IL2CPP, ARM64, iOS 15+), assigned generated placeholder iOS icon set, and wired custom launch storyboard. Added iOS postprocess step to enforce orientation policy (iPhone portrait, iPad landscape left/right) and apply launch storyboard in exported Xcode project. Generated iOS Xcode export successfully and produced standalone macOS proxy build successfully. Added App Store metadata document and stage screenshot set under docs/screenshots. Verified ad placeholder TODO insertion point in run-end UI. Final automated verification: EditMode 29/29 passing, PlayMode 18/18 passing, and no gameplay script/runtime console errors in verification runs (Unity internal rendering warnings excluded).

pipeline_summary.overall_assessment: Meets experiment success definition: complete 3-floor run loop executes without game-code console errors, assets are legible at phone scale, loop clarity is high for first-time players, and App Store metadata/build prep artifacts are complete for RC submission.
